step_rationale: Tryptophan metabolite; inflammatory marker elevated in AMI with chronic renal failure; aryl-hydrocarbon receptor signaling.
mechanism: L-kynurenine, a tryptophan catabolite, is elevated in acute MI with renal comorbidity and signals inflammatory immune activation.

references.title: Multiomics Analysis Identifies Candidate Molecular, Microbiota, and Metabolite Features Associated with Acute Myocardial Infarction Combined with Chronic Renal Failure.
references.journal: Omics : a journal of integrative biology
